feed.title: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
feed.subtitle:
Homepage 'Notices' section is a flat sequence of

entries with no dates or list wrapper; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
